description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI macOS that runs on every push to master and on pull requests and tags. Use a macOS-latest job with a matrix strategy to test different LLVM versions. For each version, check out the repository with submodules, set build settings based on the workflow event and ref, install Ansible, run a CI task with an Ansible playbook, and conditionally publish a package to Bintray if the LLVM version matches the release version and Bintray API key is available.
